rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies multiple inconsistencies and proposes thorough fixes, indicating a strong end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: Audits each major claim against evidence, highlighting specific gaps in support.
rationale.R1.6: Addresses several prose issues but doesn't cover every possible improvement.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively marks uncertainty and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Stays strictly within the requested scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content; identifies potential issues in original text.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major changes but lacks annotations for minor edits.
